market_pulse: Competitors dominating EDC Week lineup announcements and EDM residencies; Tao Beach, OMNIA, and XS leveraging big talent announcements while LIV maintains steady Saturday headliner posts.

content_gaps.description: High-energy EDC countdown/festival-prep audio used by Tao Beach, Zouk, and Hakkasan. LIV using standard club music promotions.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post countdown content for EDC Week (May 14-17) with festival energy audio and behind-the-scenes lineup reveals

content_gaps.description: OMNIA tagging multiple dance/music creators (@followthefishtv, @zedd). XS leveraging reviews from travel/party influencers. LIV mentions limited outside creator activity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to 3-5 travel/party creators on TT/IG for cross-promotion of LIV Beach David Guetta/Kaila Troy weekends (4/17-4/19)

content_gaps.description: Tao Beach showing EDC Week countdown posts. LIV's last IG post (from search results) showed April 10-12 lineups, no forward-looking countdown strategy.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post daily/weekly countdown stories for upcoming LIV events; highlight milestone dates (e.g., 2 weeks to Matroda on 4/26)

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest list member, comparing club experience; 591 likes. Also reviewed XS Nightclub separately. Strong travel/nightlife audience.
Posted 60-second walkthrough of new LIV Beach dayclub at Fontainebleau; high-energy editing, pool focus.
Edwin Griffiths, official LIV promoter, posts guest list info + bottle service packages. Consistent promotional content.
Posted about Encore Beach Club Saturday residency; 36K likes. Signals competing venue's strong talent tie-in.
